markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.004 — Divisions

The executive director shall organize the department into divisions to accomplish the department’s functions and the duties assigned to the department.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290 (H.B.2017), Sec. 34, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The executive director shall organize the department into divisions to accomplish the department’s functions and the duties assigned to the department.
